name: Daiquiri Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Put cold water in a pan.
2. Sprinkle gelatin on top; let stand at least 5 minutes.
3. Beat egg yolks and sugar together until pale and fluffy.
4. Add lime and lemon rind; mix to blend.
5. Cook gelatin mixture over low heat until dissolved.
6. Add egg yolk mixture; cook gently, stirring constantly for 3 to 5 minutes.
7. Do not let the mixture boil or it may curdle.
8. Remove from heat; stir in rum, lime and lemon juices.
9. Cool until just beginning to gel. This can be hastened by setting the bowl on a bed of ice and stirring occasionally to prevent jelly forming.
10. Whisk whipped cream until soft peaks form.
11. Fold the whipped cream and beaten egg whites into the gelatin mixture.
12. Pour into a prepared dish.
13. Chill.
14. Decorate with whipped cream, violets, and lime slices.
